name: Mathematics
description: Explore limits, differentiation, integration, and applications of calculus in scientific modeling.

modules.title: Module 1: Limits & Continuity
modules.desc: Foundational calculus concepts describing function behaviors near specific values.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Intuitive Definition of Limits
lessons.desc: Investigating limit behaviors graphically and numerically as values approach a point.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Epsilon-Delta Definition of Limits
lessons.desc: Proving limits rigorously using mathematical continuity bounds.

modules.title: Module 2: Derivatives & Applications
modules.desc: Rate of change calculations, graphing slopes, and optimization problems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Power Rule & Chain Rule
lessons.desc: Practicing algebraic rules for quick derivative computations.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Optimization & Extrema
lessons.desc: Using critical points to solve real-world efficiency and volume maximization scenarios.

name: Physics
description: Study Newtonian mechanics, optics, thermodynamics, and quantum mechanics fundamentals.

modules.title: Module 1: Classical Mechanics
modules.desc: Analysing motion, forces, momentum, and conservation laws in macroscopic systems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Newton's Laws of Motion
lessons.desc: Forces, inertia, friction coefficient equations, and action-reaction pairings.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Work-Energy Theorem
lessons.desc: Calculating kinetic vs. potential energy conservation in gravitational fields.

name: Computer Science
description: Delve into algorithms, computational theory, machine learning, and software architectures.

modules.title: Module 1: Advanced Data Structures
modules.desc: Exploring arrays, linked nodes, trees, and hash tables for optimized storage.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Trees & Balanced BSTs
lessons.desc: Implementing AVL and Red-Black trees for O(log N) lookup speeds.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Graph Traversals & Trees
lessons.desc: Writing Depth-First Search (DFS) and Breadth-First Search (BFS) graph pathing.

name: Chemistry
description: Discover reaction thermodynamics, organic synthesis paths, and molecular kinetics.

modules.title: Module 1: Organic Chemistry
modules.desc: Hydrocarbons, functional group reactions, and molecular orbital geometry structures.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Alkanes & Stereochemistry
lessons.desc: Naming branched alkanes and analyzing chiral carbon structures.

name: English Literature
description: Analyze creative prose writing styles, structures, drama, and historical poetry blocks.

modules.title: Module 1: Shakespearean Tragedy
modules.desc: Exploring the narrative arcs, themes of power, and soliloquies in classic plays.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Analysis of Hamlet
lessons.desc: Unpacking character motivations, moral dilemmas, and structural pacing in Hamlet.

name: Microbiology
description: Examine cell genetics, virus cycles, pathogens, and cell cultivation lab protocols.

modules.title: Module 1: Virology & Bacterial Cycles
modules.desc: Differentiating lytic vs. lysogenic virus paths in microscopic bacterial hosts.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Lytic and Lysogenic Replication
lessons.desc: Examining phage cycles and integration methods into host genomes.

name: History
description: Study ancient civilizations, world wars, and the political evolutions of modern human societies.

modules.title: Module 1: Rise and Fall of Empires
modules.desc: Analyzing common socio-economic factors in the collapse of ancient civilizations.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: The Roman Empire
lessons.desc: Studying the administrative challenges and military overreaches of ancient Rome.

name: Astrophysics
description: Explore stellar physics, cosmological evolution, black holes, and the physical laws governing the universe.

modules.title: Module 1: Stellar Evolution
modules.desc: Nucleosynthesis, fusion lifecycles, and the formation of supernovae and cosmic objects.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Main Sequence Stars
lessons.desc: How hydrogen fusion maintains hydrostatic equilibrium in stellar cores.
